description: CSS/styling attributes or design-system abstractions thereof, assigned to token name objects via the `property` field. Not all entries are valid CSS property identifiers — some (e.g. padding-horizontal, overlay-color, size) are design-system-level abstractions. Not anatomy parts (which belong in anatomy-terms.json) and not styling surfaces (which belong in token-objects.json). Examples: color, width, padding, font-size.

values.label: Gap
values.description: Space between flex or grid children

values.label: Shadow
values.description: Full box or drop shadow definition

values.label: Line Height
values.description: Vertical spacing between lines of text

values.label: Margin
values.description: External spacing on all sides (used for typography block margin multipliers)

values.label: Margin Top
values.description: External spacing above a block element

values.label: Margin Bottom
values.description: External spacing below a block element

values.label: Line Height Multiplier
values.description: Unitless line-height ratio (multiplier), distinct from the absolute px line-height paired with a specific font-size tier

values.label: Margin Multiplier
values.description: Unitless margin ratio (multiplier), applied to both top and bottom of a typography block

values.label: Margin Top Multiplier
values.description: Unitless margin ratio (multiplier) applied above a typography block

values.label: Margin Bottom Multiplier
values.description: Unitless margin ratio (multiplier) applied below a typography block

values.label: Text Transform
values.description: Case transformation applied to text content (e.g. uppercase, lowercase)

values.label: Default Width
values.description: Default width sizing for field components (design-system abstraction)

values.label: Thickness
values.description: Stroke or line thickness (design-system abstraction; not a standard CSS property)

values.label: Space Between
values.description: Spacing between two named endpoints (e.g. an edge and an anatomy part, or two anatomy parts). The endpoints are carried by the paired `from`/`to` name-object fields, not by this term; the legacy key is reconstructed as {from}-to-{to} and omits this property term.

values.label: Minimum
values.description: Lower-bound constraint modifier (design-system abstraction; distinct from the compound minimum-width/minimum-height terms)

values.label: Minimum Vertical Padding
values.description: Lower-bound constraint on internal vertical (top/bottom) spacing

values.label: Component Size Minimum Perspective
values.description: Lower bound used to calculate the CSS perspective transform for a component's S2 pressed/'down'-state scale-down effect (not applicable to all components)

values.label: Component Size Maximum Perspective
values.description: Upper bound used to calculate the CSS perspective transform for a component's S2 pressed/'down'-state scale-down effect (not applicable to all components)

values.label: Component Size Difference
values.description: Size delta used to calculate the CSS perspective transform for a component's S2 pressed/'down'-state scale-down effect (not applicable to all components)

values.label: Component Size Width Ratio
values.description: Width ratio used to calculate the CSS perspective transform for a component's S2 pressed/'down'-state scale-down effect (not applicable to all components)
